title: Living in Boulder vlog 8 -  27 -  2017: Strava Pages Video Screen Capture on Rollers day 2

enrichment.summary: Kyle records a late-night redo vlog (original failed due to audio issues) about his new indoor bike riding setup in his Boulder room. He describes doing Strava segment screen captures for a planned YouTube channel called 'Kyle Pounds Google Earth,' and talks about his fan setup and plans to continue riding indoors.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: enjoys it and is actively optimizing it with fans and a table around the bike
finds it a good opportunity to ride since he can't do much else while recording
works faster on the bike than sitting on the couch

entities: Kyle Pounds Google Earth (planned YouTube channel)
